name: Taco Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl and blend well.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil and fold to make an airtight packet.
3. Label the packet as "Taco Seasoning Mix."
4. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
Makes 1 package (about 2 T) of mix. Using the above recipe as a guide, you can increase the amounts to make any number of packages.
This group of recipes comes from the cookbook "Make-A-Mix Cookery" by Karine Eliason, Nevada Harward & Madeline Westover.
